title: "Lois Jean Belcher - Cause of death"

---

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">Lois Jean Belcher was born on May 30, 1933 to Alfred Belcher and Jean Scott.&nbsp; Jean is my 5th Cousin, 1x removed.</span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">Lois married Gene Jorgenson.&nbsp; She passed away June 15, 1956.&nbsp; Her cause of death is noted as</span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">&nbsp;</span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">&nbsp;<img alt="" src="data:image/png;base64," /></span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">Reading further down her death certificate, we learn</span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">&nbsp;</span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;"><img alt="" src="data:image/png;base64," /></span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">Transcription:</span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;"></span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">

<blockquote>
7 month pregnant, woman apparently fainted and fell into empty bath tub - suffocating from angulated trachea.</blockquote>

I haven't found information on if they tried to save the baby.&nbsp; At 7 months, today the baby was at a development state it could be saved.&nbsp; I suspect the baby passed away as well.&nbsp; I'm still looking for the details.</span></span></h1>

<h1 class="userCardTitle">
<span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-size: small;">RIP Lois...

</span></span></h1>

~ Tom ~</div>
